signal_points: Declining hashprice below breakevens forces mid-tier miner shutdowns, accelerating network hashrate contraction.
New capacity deployment at 7.8% weekly surge outpaces network difficulty, squeezing margins for older fleets.
A sustained hashprice rally above $45 is critical for BMN revenue to meet investor yield targets.

btc_price: Rising BTC price boosts hashprice, enhancing miner revenue and treasury asset value significantly.
Current BTC breakout pattern favors strategic accumulation, rewarding miners who expand capacity now.
hashprice: Mid-tier miners below S19 XP breakeven must shut down or face losses.
Declining hashprice below critical breakevens signals imminent hashrate contraction.
difficulty: Projected 2.1% difficulty increase will compress hashprice by ~2.1%, accelerating miner margin squeeze.
The 7.8% weekly hashrate surge signals rapid deployment of new, efficient mining capacity.
bmn_revenue: BMN revenue is flat, entirely reliant on a hashprice rebound for any upside.
Current yield lags targets; a sustained hashprice rally to $45 is essential.
strc: STRC near par signals a neutral market valuation, reflecting liquidation preference, not growth expectations.
A flat BTC Rating indicates Strategy is passively managing its Bitcoin treasury, neither accumulating nor selling aggressively.
bmn_hashrate: BMN's hashrate is falling behind network growth, signaling a shrinking revenue share for token holders.
Active miner count suggests BMN is prioritizing efficiency over aggressive fleet expansion.
